---
title: "About"
---

# About This Course

This website is structured as a beginner-friendly course on media piracy using a pirate ship metaphor.

The lessons are designed to help students understand:

- why people access media outside legal channels,
- the consequences of fragmented streaming platforms,
- the risks of unregulated piracy sites,
- how archiving and censorship shape access,
- and the economic pressures that affect creators and consumers.

## Learn with a Story

Each page is a lesson in a larger narrative: living on a pirate ship while navigating modern media oceans. You will see arguments both for and against piracy, then decide where you stand.
